[NONE][CKV_AWS_338] Ensure CloudWatch log groups retains logs for at least 1 year

failure.message: Ensure CloudWatch log groups retains logs for at least 1 year

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_cloudwatch_log_group.vpc_flow_logs File: /iac/main.tf: 22-29 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-logging-policies/bc-aws-338
22 | resource "aws_cloudwatch_log_group" "vpc_flow_logs" { 23 | name = "/aws/vpc/${local.name_prefix}/flow-logs" 24 | retention_in_days = var.log_retention_days 25 | 26 | tags = merge(local.common_tags, { 27 | Name = "${local.name_prefix}-vpc-flow-logs" 28 | }) 29 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_158] Ensure that CloudWatch Log Group is encrypted by KMS

failure.message: Ensure that CloudWatch Log Group is encrypted by KMS

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_cloudwatch_log_group.vpc_flow_logs File: /iac/main.tf: 22-29 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-general-policies/ensure-that-cloudwatch-log-group-is-encrypted-by-kms
22 | resource "aws_cloudwatch_log_group" "vpc_flow_logs" { 23 | name = "/aws/vpc/${local.name_prefix}/flow-logs" 24 | retention_in_days = var.log_retention_days 25 | 26 | tags = merge(local.common_tags, { 27 | Name = "${local.name_prefix}-vpc-flow-logs" 28 | }) 29 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_130] Ensure VPC subnets do not assign public IP by default

failure.message: Ensure VPC subnets do not assign public IP by default

testcase.failure:
Resource: module.networking.aws_subnet.public[0] File: /iac/modules/networking/subnets.tf: 2-14 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-networking-policies/ensure-vpc-subnets-do-not-assign-public-ip-by-default
2 | resource "aws_subnet" "public" { 3 | count = length(var.public_subnet_cidrs) 4 | 5 | vpc_id = aws_vpc.main.id 6 | cidr_block = var.public_subnet_cidrs[count.index] 7 | availability_zone = var.availability_zones[count.index] 8 | map_public_ip_on_launch = true 9 | 10 | tags = { 11 | Name = "${var.project_name}-${var.environment}-public-${var.availability_zones[count.index]}" 12 | Tier = "public" 13 | } 14 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_130] Ensure VPC subnets do not assign public IP by default

failure.message: Ensure VPC subnets do not assign public IP by default

testcase.failure:
Resource: module.networking.aws_subnet.public[1] File: /iac/modules/networking/subnets.tf: 2-14 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-networking-policies/ensure-vpc-subnets-do-not-assign-public-ip-by-default
2 | resource "aws_subnet" "public" { 3 | count = length(var.public_subnet_cidrs) 4 | 5 | vpc_id = aws_vpc.main.id 6 | cidr_block = var.public_subnet_cidrs[count.index] 7 | availability_zone = var.availability_zones[count.index] 8 | map_public_ip_on_launch = true 9 | 10 | tags = { 11 | Name = "${var.project_name}-${var.environment}-public-${var.availability_zones[count.index]}" 12 | Tier = "public" 13 | } 14 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_338] Ensure CloudWatch log groups retains logs for at least 1 year

failure.message: Ensure CloudWatch log groups retains logs for at least 1 year

testcase.failure:
Resource: module.security.aws_cloudwatch_log_group.regional_waf[0] File: /iac/modules/security/waf.tf: 313-321 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-logging-policies/bc-aws-338
313 | resource "aws_cloudwatch_log_group" "regional_waf" { 314 | count = var.enable_regional_waf ? 1 : 0 315 | name = "aws-waf-logs-${local.name_prefix}-regional" 316 | retention_in_days = 30 317 | 318 | tags = merge(local.common_tags, { 319 | Name = "${local.name_prefix}-regional-waf-logs" 320 | }) 321 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV2_AWS_57] Ensure Secrets Manager secrets should have automatic rotation enabled

failure.message: Ensure Secrets Manager secrets should have automatic rotation enabled

testcase.failure:
Resource: module.config.aws_secretsmanager_secret.api_keys File: /iac/modules/config/secrets.tf: 1-9 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-general-policies/bc-aws-2-57
1 | resource "aws_secretsmanager_secret" "api_keys" { 2 | name_prefix = "${local.name_prefix}-api-keys-" 3 | description = "Claves de API para servicios externos (Flow, Infocorp)" 4 | kms_key_id = var.secrets_kms_key_arn != null ? var.secrets_kms_key_arn : null 5 | recovery_window_in_days = var.environment == "prod" ? 30 : 7 6 | tags = merge(local.common_tags, { 7 | Name = "${local.name_prefix}-api-keys" 8 | }) 9 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV2_AWS_57] Ensure Secrets Manager secrets should have automatic rotation enabled

failure.message: Ensure Secrets Manager secrets should have automatic rotation enabled

testcase.failure:
Resource: module.config.aws_secretsmanager_secret.jwt_config File: /iac/modules/config/secrets.tf: 25-33 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-general-policies/bc-aws-2-57
25 | resource "aws_secretsmanager_secret" "jwt_config" { 26 | name_prefix = "${local.name_prefix}-jwt-config-" 27 | description = "Configuración de JWT: clave privada, algoritmo, expiración" 28 | kms_key_id = var.secrets_kms_key_arn != null ? var.secrets_kms_key_arn : null 29 | recovery_window_in_days = var.environment == "prod" ? 30 : 7 30 | tags = merge(local.common_tags, { 31 | Name = "${local.name_prefix}-jwt-config" 32 | }) 33 | }

failure.message: Ensure Secrets Manager secrets should have automatic rotation enabled

testcase.failure:
Resource: module.config.aws_secretsmanager_secret.database[0] File: /iac/modules/config/secrets.tf: 51-60 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-general-policies/bc-aws-2-57
51 | resource "aws_secretsmanager_secret" "database" { 52 | count = var.create_database_secret ? 1 : 0 53 | name_prefix = "${local.name_prefix}-database-" 54 | description = "Credenciales de base de datos RDS" 55 | kms_key_id = var.secrets_kms_key_arn != null ? var.secrets_kms_key_arn : null 56 | recovery_window_in_days = var.environment == "prod" ? 30 : 7 57 | tags = merge(local.common_tags, { 58 | Name = "${local.name_prefix}-database" 59 | }) 60 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV2_AWS_34] AWS SSM Parameter should be Encrypted

failure.message: AWS SSM Parameter should be Encrypted

testcase.failure:
Resource: module.config.aws_ssm_parameter.config["api/flow-api-url"] File: /iac/modules/config/ssm_parameters.tf: 85-106 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-general-policies/ensure-aws-ssm-parameter-is-encrypted
85 | resource "aws_ssm_parameter" "config" { 86 | for_each = local.ssm_parameters 87 | 88 | name = "${local.ssm_base_path}/${each.key}" 89 | type = each.value.type 90 | value = each.value.value 91 | description = each.value.description 92 | tier = each.value.tier 93 | data_type = "text" 94 | overwrite = true 95 | allowed_pattern = null 96 | 97 | tags = merge(local.common_tags, { 98 | Name = "${local.name_prefix}/${each.key}" 99 | }) 100 | 101 | lifecycle { 102 | prevent_destroy = false 103 | ignore_changes = [ 104 | ] 105 | } 106 | }
